name: NocoDB
description: Full NocoDB management: bases, tables, schema/fields, and records. Create/rename/delete bases and tables, read and edit table schema (add/change/remove columns), and CRUD records with filtering and sorting

credentials_required.label: NocoDB Instance URL
credentials_required.hint: Base URL of your NocoDB instance (e.g. https://nocodb.example.com)

credentials_required.label: NocoDB API Token
credentials_required.hint: Account Settings > API Tokens in NocoDB

tools.name: nocodb_list_tables
tools.description: List tables in a NocoDB base

tools.name: nocodb_list_records
tools.description: List records from a NocoDB table with optional filtering and sorting

tools.name: nocodb_get_record
tools.description: Get a single record by ID from a NocoDB table

tools.name: nocodb_create_record
tools.description: Create a new record in a NocoDB table

tools.name: nocodb_update_record
tools.description: Update an existing record in a NocoDB table

tools.name: nocodb_delete_record
tools.description: Delete a record from a NocoDB table

tools.name: nocodb_get_table_schema
tools.description: Read a table's full schema: field names, types, primary key, and select options

tools.name: nocodb_create_table
tools.description: Create a new table (with optional columns) in a base

tools.name: nocodb_delete_table
tools.description: Delete a table and all its records (irreversible)

tools.name: nocodb_create_column
tools.description: Add a new field/column to a table (any NocoDB field type)

tools.name: nocodb_update_column
tools.description: Update a field/column (rename or change type)

tools.name: nocodb_delete_column
tools.description: Delete a field/column and its data (irreversible)

tools.name: nocodb_delete_base
tools.description: Delete a base and all its tables and records (irreversible)

author: freddy-schuetz
